title: Config types, matchers, and settings loading
purpose: Config-driven hooks require typed config structures, regex-based matchers, and settings file loading. This brief defines the HookEventType taxonomy that maps config names to traits, extends NC-002's HookSettings with the 8 additional event types from the norn-hooks design, implements regex-compiled matchers, and builds the 3-tier settings loader. NH-005 (ShellCommandHook) and NH-006 (CLI wiring) consume these types.
task: Create config.rs with HookEventType enum (13 variants) and any bridge types needed beyond NC-002's HookSettings/HookEntry. Extend HookSettings in norn::config::types with the 8 new event type fields (user_prompt, stop, subagent_start, subagent_stop, session_start, session_end, pre_compaction, post_tool_failure). Create matchers.rs with HookMatcher: compile regex at load time, match against per-event-type inputs. Create loader.rs with load_hooks_from_settings: read 3 settings files, merge hook arrays, validate required timeout, return parsed config. All in crates/norn/src/integration/hooks/.

requirements.title: HookEventType enum
requirements.spec: HookEventType SHALL be a closed enum with 13 variants matching the snake_case config names: PreTool, PostTool, PostToolFailure, PreLlm, PostLlm, SessionEvent, UserPrompt, Stop, SubagentStart, SubagentStop, SessionStart, SessionEnd, PreCompaction. Each variant SHALL map to a specific hook trait for dispatch.
acceptance: HookEventType enum with 13 variants in crates/norn/src/integration/hooks/config.rs
Derives Clone, Copy, Debug, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize
Serde renames to snake_case (e.g. PreTool serializes as "pre_tool")
Test: round-trip all 13 variants through serde_json

requirements.title: Extend HookSettings with new event types
requirements.spec: HookSettings in norn::config::types SHALL gain 8 new Optional fields: user_prompt, stop, subagent_start, subagent_stop, session_start, session_end, pre_compaction, post_tool_failure. Each is Option<Vec<HookEntry>>. The 5 existing fields from NC-002 SHALL NOT be modified.
acceptance: HookSettings has 13 total fields (5 from NC-002 + 8 new)
All new fields are Option<Vec<HookEntry>>
Default yields all-None for new fields
Existing HookSettings tests pass unchanged
Test: deserialize JSON with new fields populated, verify values

requirements.title: Required timeout validation
requirements.spec: WHEN loading hook entries from settings, IF a HookEntry has timeout set to None, THEN the loader SHALL reject it with a config error. The timeout field is structurally optional in the HookEntry type (for deserialization) but validated as required at load time.
acceptance: Loader rejects HookEntry with timeout: None, producing a descriptive error message
Error message includes the event type and command for identification
HookEntry with timeout: Some(30) passes validation
Test: settings JSON with missing timeout field produces ConfigError

requirements.title: HookMatcher regex compilation
requirements.spec: HookMatcher SHALL compile a regex pattern at construction time. WHEN the pattern is None, empty, or "*", the matcher SHALL match all inputs. IF the pattern is not valid regex, THEN construction SHALL return a config error.
acceptance: HookMatcher::new(pattern: Option<&str>) -> Result<Self, ConfigError>
None, empty string, and "*" all produce a match-all matcher
Valid regex compiled via regex::Regex
Invalid regex returns ConfigError with the regex error message
matches(&self, input: &str) -> bool uses regex full-match semantics
Test: exact match ("Write" matches "Write", not "WriteFile")
Test: regex match ("Edit|Write" matches both)
Test: wildcard match ("*" matches anything)
Test: invalid regex rejected at construction

requirements.title: Per-event-type matcher inputs
requirements.spec: Each HookEventType SHALL define what string the matcher is tested against. Tool events match tool name. LLM events match model name. Subagent events match profile name or agent type. Session events match event variant name. Events without matcher support always fire.
acceptance: Tool events (pre_tool, post_tool, post_tool_failure): matcher tested against tool_name
LLM events (pre_llm, post_llm): matcher tested against model name
Subagent events (subagent_start, subagent_stop): matcher tested against agent type string
Session event: matcher tested against event variant name (e.g. "UserMessage", "ToolResult")
No-matcher events (user_prompt, stop, session_start, session_end, pre_compaction): always fire regardless of matcher value
A method or function maps HookEventType to whether matchers are supported
Test: verify each event type category returns the correct matcher input behavior

requirements.title: Settings file loading and 3-tier merge
requirements.spec: load_hooks_from_settings SHALL read hook configuration from up to 3 files: ~/.norn/settings.json (user-global), .norn/settings.json (project), .norn/settings.local.json (local project). WHEN multiple files exist, hook arrays SHALL be concatenated per event type (user-global first, local-project last). Missing files SHALL be silently skipped.
acceptance: load_hooks_from_settings(cwd: &Path) -> Result<HookSettings, ConfigError>
Reads ~/.norn/settings.json via norn::config::paths::norn_dir()
Reads {cwd}/.norn/settings.json
Reads {cwd}/.norn/settings.local.json
Missing files silently skipped (not errors)
Per event type: arrays concatenated in order (user-global, project, local)
Invalid JSON in any file produces ConfigError with file path in message
Settings captured as a snapshot — the function reads once and returns
Test: 3-tier merge with overlapping event types produces concatenated arrays
Test: missing files produce empty HookSettings (not error)

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement ShellCommandHook — that is NH-005
SHALL NOT wire hooks into the CLI builder — that is NH-006
SHALL NOT modify existing HookSettings fields from NC-002
SHALL NOT add default timeout values — timeout is validated as required at load time
SHALL NOT add todo!() or unimplemented!() macros anywhere
verification: HookEventType round-trips all 13 variants through serde_json
HookSettings has 13 total fields (grep for 'Option<Vec<HookEntry>>' in types.rs)
HookMatcher rejects invalid regex at construction time — verified by test
3-tier merge concatenates arrays — verified by test
No file exceeds 500 lines of code (excluding tests, comments, whitespace)
